## Test plan

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check . && ruff format --check .` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are focused and reviewable (not micro-commits)
- [ ] Docs updated if public behaviour changed
- [ ] No hardcoded values — use `AppSettings` / config
- [ ] No `print()` — use `logging`
- [ ] New modules have unit tests
